articles.title: SpaceX reportedly files for IPO but it’s keeping the numbers secret (for now)
articles.summary: What's expected to be the biggest IPO in human history is reportedly underway. SpaceX has filed for an initial public offering with the Securities and Exchange Commission, according to a report from Bloomberg. But for now, the filing is confidential. Under SEC rules, SpaceX isn't required to make its S-1 prospectus public until 15 days […]
